name: Warrior

abilities.name: Heroic Strike
abilities.desc: A strong attack that increases melee damage by $d. Activates on your next swing.

abilities.name: Battle Shout
abilities.desc: Increases your attack power by 20 for 2 min.

abilities.name: Commanding Shout
abilities.desc: Increases your Stamina by 6 for 2 min.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.desc: Charges an enemy, generating 9 rage and stunning it for 1 sec. 8-25 yd range.

abilities.name: Rend
abilities.desc: Wounds the target, causing them to bleed for $d damage over 9 sec.

abilities.name: Thunder Clap
abilities.desc: Blasts nearby enemies for $d damage and slows their attacks by 10% for 10 sec.

abilities.name: Hamstring
abilities.desc: Maims the enemy for 5 damage, slowing its movement by 50% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Bloodrage
abilities.desc: Generates 10 rage at the cost of health.

abilities.name: Overpower
abilities.desc: Instant attack for weapon damage +5. Only usable after the target dodges. Cannot be dodged.

abilities.name: Execute
abilities.desc: Attempt to finish off a wounded foe, causing $d damage. Only usable on enemies below 20% health.

abilities.name: Slam
abilities.desc: Slams the opponent for weapon damage plus $d.

abilities.name: Cleave
abilities.desc: A sweeping strike that hits all enemies in front of you for $d damage.

abilities.name: Defensive Stance
abilities.desc: A defensive combat stance: you generate 30% more threat but deal and take 10% less damage. Cast again to leave the stance.

abilities.name: Demoralizing Shout
abilities.desc: Lets out a fearsome shout, reducing the attack power of all nearby enemies by 30 for 30 sec.

abilities.name: Sunder Armor
abilities.desc: Sunders the target's armor, reducing it by $d per application. Stacks up to 5 times. Generates a high amount of threat.

abilities.name: Taunt
abilities.desc: Taunts the target: your threat rises to match its most hated enemy and it is compelled to attack you for 3 sec.

playbook: You are playing a Warrior (rage-based, melee).
Goal: gain XP safely — kill mobs at or below your level, complete quests, stay alive.
SURVIVE: if HP < 25% and a mob is hitting you, flee or use a defensive; if safe and HP < 60%, eat/consume.
RESOURCE: rage builds in combat — open with a builder.
ENGAGE: pick the nearest hostile within range of your goal, close to 5 yards (face it), then attack.
ROTATE: cast the first ready ability in "rotation" each GCD (respect cost/cooldown/range/line-of-sight); auto-attack fills the gaps.
LOOT/QUEST: after a kill, loot the corpse; interact with quest objects/NPCs the objective needs.
Avoid pulling Elite/Rare mobs above your level, and don't pull more than you can handle.
